title: Phase 6 M39 T7 — Telemetry kind filter E2E
status: head-of-queue — M39 T6 subview request propagation shipped; next cover filtered telemetry in Playwright
predecessor: Phase 6 M39 T6 — Wire subviews to filtered requests
dor: TelemetryView chips pass kindFilter into all telemetry subviews
CompanyTelemetry, EmployeeTelemetry, and CostBreakdown translate kindFilter through telemetryRequestKind
All four aggregate hooks receive kind in their request objects
Focused telemetry-subviews tests, typecheck, lint, and strict claims are green after T6
acceptance: Generate at least one work run through normal chat path
Generate at least one copilot run through teamx.copilot.configure({ companyId })
Open Telemetry and confirm All total runs covers visible filtered buckets
Click data-telemetry-kind-filter="copilot" and verify Total Runs reflects only copilot runs
Click data-telemetry-kind-filter="work" and verify Total Runs reflects only work runs
Add data-telemetry-stat="total-runs" to CompanyTelemetry if needed
Run pnpm -F @team-x/desktop exec playwright test e2e/telemetry-kind-filter.spec.ts
Run pnpm typecheck, pnpm lint, and pnpm audit:claims -- --strict before ledgering
nextStep: Begin T7 by writing the failing Playwright spec for copilot/work telemetry filtering and add a stable total-runs selector only if the spec needs it.
